title: Game On for National Video Games Day!
story: Controllers are clicking and screens are glowing extra bright on July 8 because it's National Video Games Day! Gamers everywhere celebrate by diving into their favorite adventures, whether they're racing cars, building worlds, or battling dragons. Many people host gaming marathons with friends, trying out new releases or revisiting classic favorites. Social media fills up with screenshots of epic wins and funny game moments. Some families have friendly tournaments, while gaming stores offer special deals and demos. It's the perfect day to appreciate how video games bring people together, spark creativity, and provide endless entertainment for players of all ages.
activity_question: What do many people do on National Video Games Day to celebrate with friends?
bonus_fact: The first video game was created in 1958 and was basically electronic ping-pong!

title: Nuts About Chocolate Day!
story: Crunch time arrives every July 8 when chocolate lovers celebrate National Chocolate with Almonds Day! This sweet holiday honors the perfect combo of creamy chocolate and crunchy almonds. People mark the day by munching on almond chocolate bars, sharing boxes of chocolate-covered almonds with friends, or baking homemade treats that mix both ingredients. Some families have almond-chocolate baking contests, while others simply raid the candy aisle for their favorite nutty chocolate goodies. Social media fills with photos of people's favorite almond-chocolate creations, from fancy truffles to simple candy bars, proving this nutty combination never goes out of style.
activity_question: What do people often share with friends on National Chocolate with Almonds Day?
bonus_fact: Almonds were considered so valuable that ancient Romans threw them at weddings for good luck!

title: National Be a Kid Again Day
story: Adults everywhere are jumping on trampolines, eating ice cream for breakfast, and playing hopscotch in the streets! National Be a Kid Again Day happens every July 8, giving grown-ups permission to act silly and carefree. People blow bubbles at work, have pillow fights, watch cartoons, and play with toys they loved as children. Some adults visit playgrounds, build blanket forts, or challenge friends to video game tournaments. The holiday reminds everyone that being playful and imaginative shouldn't stop when you grow up. It's the perfect excuse to laugh loudly, skip instead of walk, and remember what pure fun feels like!
activity_question: What are some ways adults celebrate National Be a Kid Again Day?
activity_choices: Blow bubbles and build blanket forts
activity_answer: Blow bubbles and build blanket forts
follow_up_question: What childhood activity would you want to do again as an adult?

title: Muffin Madness: Blueberry Bonanza Day!
story: Bakeries across America smell extra sweet on July 8 because it's National Blueberry Muffin Day! People celebrate by baking fresh muffins at home, buying them from their favorite coffee shops, or sharing photos of their fluffy creations online. Many families make it a tradition to pick fresh blueberries and turn them into warm, golden muffins together. Some bakeries even offer special deals or giant-sized muffins just for this delicious day!
activity_question: What do many families do together to celebrate National Blueberry Muffin Day?
activity_choices: Pick fresh blueberries and bake muffins
activity_answer: Pick fresh blueberries and bake muffins
bonus_fact: The average blueberry muffin contains about 75 individual blueberries!

title: Sweet Dreams Are Made of Milk Chocolate
story: Chocolate lovers unite because July 8 is National Milk Chocolate Day! This creamy, sweet treat gets its own special celebration every year. People mark this delicious day by indulging in their favorite milk chocolate bars, cookies, and candies. Some families bake chocolate chip cookies together, while others visit chocolate shops to try new flavors. Social media fills with photos of chocolate desserts and candy hauls. Unlike dark chocolate, milk chocolate contains added milk powder or condensed milk, making it smoother and sweeter. Many chocolate companies offer special deals and limited-edition treats just for this holiday, giving everyone the perfect excuse to satisfy their sweet tooth guilt-free!
activity_question: What makes milk chocolate different from dark chocolate?
activity_choices: It contains added milk powder or condensed milk
It's made with white sugar instead of brown sugar
It has more cocoa beans in it
It's shaped like tiny milk bottles
activity_answer: It contains added milk powder or condensed milk
bonus_fact: Americans eat about 2.8 billion pounds of chocolate every year!

title: Scud Day: When Clouds Go Racing By
story: Fast-moving gray clouds called scuds race across the sky on July 8 during National Scud Day! These speedy clouds zoom past much faster than regular fluffy white clouds, creating an amazing sky show. People celebrate by going outside to watch scuds dash overhead, especially on windy or stormy days when they move the quickest. Cloud watchers bring blankets to lie on the grass and point out the coolest scud formations. Some families make it a game to count how many scuds they spot in ten minutes. Weather fans love posting scud photos on social media with hashtags like #ScudDay and #CloudRacing. It's the perfect excuse to look up and appreciate nature's free entertainment!
activity_question: What makes scud clouds special compared to regular clouds?
activity_choices: They move much faster across the sky
activity_answer: They move much faster across the sky
follow_up_question: What other types of clouds have you noticed in the sky?
